chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 2087 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.25. 2. For orders on CMA No.712/2023. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No.713/2023. 23.04.2026 Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2023 without any progress. Diary demonstrates that at no point in the last three years applicant has made any effort to have the matter listed or heard. Today the only argument articulate is evidential in nature pertaining to origin of goods. Evidential aspect has already been considered by the Appellate Tribunal as seen in paragraphs 4 and 5 of the impugned judgment. Since no case has been made out for denovo adjudication of evidence in reference jurisdiction and since no question of law has been articulated, therefore, reference application is dismissed in limine. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
